## What changed

<!-- One or two sentences. Reference the issue if there is one. -->

## Why

<!-- The motivating problem. For new features, the missing capability;
     for bug fixes, the symptom and what was wrong. -->

## How to verify

<!-- The test that covers this. If you added a feature, link the integration
     test and the entry you added to the coverage matrix in README.md. -->

- [ ] `swift test` passes
- [ ] `make check` passes (SwiftLint + SwiftFormat)
- [ ] If you added a new feature: integration test added, coverage matrix in `README.md` updated
- [ ] If you changed generator output: the change is intentional and the assertions in the affected test were updated to match
